description: I played a key role in implementing educational and skill development initiatives across Kerala. I coordinated the Viswasanthi–TATA Elxsi Scholarship Programme for economically disadvantaged Polytechnic students, facilitating financial support, mentorship, and career development opportunities.

company: State Health System Resource Centre (SHSRC), Kerala - ICMR
description: Contributed to the ICMR-funded SWAAS COPD study by conducting field investigations, collecting high-quality research data, and supporting community-based public health research initiatives
